name: streaming-list
description: A list that fills in live as values stream in — the same loading/empty/error states as data-list, but rows arrive over time and new arrivals are announced politely. Pairs with use-stream.

notes: Renders a labelled role=list with role=listitem rows
A polite live region announces new arrivals ('N new items') without stealing focus
Inherits the StateBoundary empty and error + retry slots

intents: render a live feed that fills in as events stream in
an activity list backed by Server-Sent Events or a WebSocket
a streaming list with loading skeletons, empty and error states
